name: Pickled Pork Snouts (Kilawin)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Cracked pepper corns or ground black pepper
1 medium Chopped onion - or green onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean hairs from pork snouts by scraping them with a knife.
2. Remove excess fat.
3. Place the snouts in a pot and cover with enough water to boil.
4. When the snouts are tender and soft, let them cool off.
5. Cut the snouts into 1-inch size pieces.
6. Mix the rest of the ingredients with the cut snouts.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
